about.heading: About Me
about.text: Hello! I'm M Tanusree Reddy, a passionate AI & Data Science Engineer and Full-Stack Developer. I specialize in building responsive, elegant, and scalable web applications and AI-driven solutions. I enjoy solving complex problems and creating clean, user-friendly designs.

skills.heading: My Skills
skills.subheading: Technologies I use to build scalable and intelligent solutions.

items.title: AI-Powered Recruitment Portal
items.description: Built recruiter dashboard handling 500+ candidates with resume parsing & match scoring (0–100%), skill gap detection, and automated JD generation.

items.title: Video Analysis Platform
items.description: Real-time object detection using YOLOv8 with frame optimization for reduced latency and REST API integration.

items.title: Jewellery E-commerce Website
items.description: Full-stack platform with authentication and a collaborative filtering recommendation engine. Features a responsive Tailwind UI.
Analyzed 7.7K+ Netflix records and built an Airbnb price prediction model using Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn.

items.company: AICTE – Shell India Markets – Edunet Foundation
items.description: Built a real-time traffic monitoring system and implemented SORT multi-object tracking using OpenCV & YOLOv8.
